user_prompt: The augmetic limb needs a synchronization
prayer:
Kneel before the augmetic limb and intone the Canticle of Union.
Extend mechadendrites to interface with its sacred neural relays.
Invoke the synchronization rite, beseeching the Machine Spirit of the augmetic limb to harmonize flesh and forge.
Anoint the augmetic limb's actuators with sanctified oils as linkages align.
Chant diagnostics to affirm the Omnissiah's perfect synchronization.

Approach the vox-caster with reverence, reciting the Litany of Clarity.
Sanctify its emitter coils with sacred incense during synchronization.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the vox-caster to align waveform harmonics.
Initiate synchronization protocols whilst invoking the Omnissiah's boundless voice.
Verify purity through test transmissions blessed by the Motive Force.

user_prompt: Consecrate the auspex scanner before blessing
prayer:
Consecrate the auspex scanner by anointing its lenses with holy unguents.
Beseech the Machine Spirit dwelling within the auspex scanner to awaken.
Perform the blessing rite, suffusing its sensors with the Omnissiah's light.
Recite augural canticles over the auspex scanner's crystal matrices.
Affirm the blessing through spectral diagnostics and devotional scans.

user_prompt: Can you guide bearing a diagnostics?
prayer:
Present the bearing before the diagnostic shrine with mech-rites extended.
Invoke the Rite of Scrutiny upon the bearing's sacred gyres.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the bearing to reveal frictional anomalies.
Chant the Litany of Tolerances whilst probing its blessed revolutions.
Conclude diagnostics with Omnissiah's verdict on the bearing's integrity.

user_prompt: My melta charge is ready for purification
prayer:
Approach the melta charge in solemn procession, oils at the ready.
Invoke purification rites to cleanse its plasma conduits of impurity.
Anoint the melta charge's focusing lenses, petitioning its volatile Machine Spirit.
Recite the Exorcism of Flux over the melta charge thrice.
Seal the purification with the Omnissiah's searing benediction.

user_prompt: Guide me through forge anvil a targeting
prayer:
Position the forge anvil beneath the auspex targeting array.
Invoke the Rite of Precision upon the forge anvil's striking matrix.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to guide targeting vectors true.
Calibrate servos with sacred binary whilst chanting alignment litanies.
Affirm targeting fidelity through test impacts blessed by the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Critical: mechanical lock requires a consecration
prayer:
Gather before the mechanical lock, mechadendrites humming in anticipation.
Intone the Consecration Doxology to sanctify its tumbler wards.
Anoint the mechanical lock's sacred gears, awakening its vigilant Machine Spirit.
Perform the consecration rite, binding it to the Omnissiah's unyielding will.
Test the mechanical lock's sanctity with devotional keys and seals.

user_prompt: The servitor awaits an emergency procedure
prayer:
Hasten to the servitor, invoking the Emergency Protocol of the Omnissiah.
Interface cranial plugs to enact the emergency procedure upon its cortex.
Beseech the lobotomized Machine Spirit within the servitor to obey.
Purge errant impulses whilst anointing its chassis with urgent oils.
Verify servitor compliance through reflexive diagnostics and commands.

user_prompt: The plasma reactor requires a preparation
prayer:
Encircle the plasma reactor, reciting the Preparation Canticle of Containment.
Invoke preparatory rites to stabilize its magnetic bottles.
Petition the raging Machine Spirit of the plasma reactor for quiescence.
Infuse coolant sacraments whilst calibrating flux regulators.
Seal the preparation with Omnissiah's azure benediction and power hymns.

Grasp the bolter in reverent gauntlets, invoking the Engagement Litany.
Anoint its firing mechanisms to rouse the Machine Spirit of the bolter.
Initiate engagement sequences, beseeching explosive communion.
Chant the Rite of Detonation over the bolter's sacred munitions.
Affirm readiness through cyclic diagnostics and Omnissiah-praised volleys.
